targets.query: from(bucket: "my-bucket") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "sensor_1") |> filter(fn: (r) => r["dataset"] == "${dataset}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r["unit"] == "${unit}") |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: if r.elapsed > 1500 then float(v: 0.0/0.0) else r._value, _field: r._field, _measurement: r._measurement, dataset: r.dataset, unit: r.unit })) |> yield(name: "result")

list.name: dataset
list.query: from(bucket: "my-bucket") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry") |> keep(columns: ["dataset"]) |> distinct(column: "dataset")
list.label: Dataset

list.name: unit
list.query: from(bucket: "my-bucket") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r["dataset"] == "${dataset}") |> keep(columns: ["unit"]) |> distinct(column: "unit")
list.label: Engine Unit
